DEFT SHALL BE REINSTATED TO TENANCY UPON PAYMENT OF PLTF'S LEGAL FEES TO DATE OF $875.00 PAYABLE IN AMOUNTS OF $200.00 ON 7/1, 8/1, 9/1 AND THE BALANCE OF $175.00 ON 10/1/01.
